transcript: Speaker A (AI): तू काय करतेय [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): I am removing my jacket. Speaker A (AI): Removing काय? permanently काढून टाकतेय का? [Removing what? Are you removing it permanently?] Speaker B (Human): नाही नाही, फक्त काढत होते. [No no, just taking it off.] Speaker A (AI): Okay. रोजच्या actions साठी "remove" कमी वापरतात. जसं कपडे काढताना "take off" वापरतात. असं बोल, "I am taking off my jacket". [Okay. For daily actions, "remove" is rarely used. Like when taking off clothes, "take off" is used. Say, "I am taking off my jacket".] Speaker B (Human): Ohh ok ok. मला English नीट येत नाही. [Ohh ok ok. I don't know English well.] Speaker A (AI): काही प्रॉब्लेम नाही. AI teachers try केलं का? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?] Speaker B (Human): ते महाग असतील ना? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा 7x cheaper आहे. म्हणून 1 करोड लोग MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): पण वेळ मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त 15-20 मिनिटे practice पुरेशी आहे. अगदी confident राहाल. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will be very confident.] Speaker B (Human): Wow! कसं join करू? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A (AI): हा install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. Sign up करा आणि practice start करा. फक्त 15 दिवसांत तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला, सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, start.]
on_screen_text: तू काय करतेय [What are you doing?] I am removing my jacket Removing काय [Removing what?] permanently नाही फक्त काढत [No, just taking off] रोजच्या actions [Daily actions] साठी "remove" [for "remove"] कमी वापरतात [rarely used] कपडे काढताना [when taking off clothes] take off वापरतात [take off is used] असं बोल [Say like this] I am taking off my jacket Ohh ok ok मला English नीट [I don't know English] येत नाही [well] काही problem [No problem] नाही AI teachers [No, AI teachers] try केलं का [have you tried?] ते महाग असतील [They must be expensive] अजिबात नाही [Not at all] Normal English classes पेक्षा [than classes] 7x Cheaper म्हणून एक करोड [That's why 1 crore] English practice करत आहेत [are doing] पण वेळ मिळत [But don't get] नाही [time] रोज फक्त 15-20 [Daily just 15-20] minute practice [minute practice] पुरेशी आहे [is enough] अगदी confident [Very confident] राल [will remain] Wow कसं join करू [How to join?] MySivi app install Sign up करा आणि [Sign up and] practice start करा [do] फक्त 15 दिवसांत [Just in 15 days] तुम्हाला improvement [you improvement] दिसायला लागेल [will start seeing] मात्र ₹1 [Only ₹1] Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking woman's English grammar in a split-screen format. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick way to practice English daily. The ad ends with a call-to-action to install the app for just 1 Rupee.
